# ElektraOS.dev - AI engineering and automation studio

> Independent studio run by Yossra Benzad, a full-stack engineer based in London. Custom SaaS, AI systems, automation, and websites - precision-engineered from concept to production for clients across 9 markets (UK, Ghana, Morocco, Denmark, Germany, Netherlands, Sweden, France, Italy). Transparent pricing: AI chatbots from $500, workflow automation from $300, SEO from $400, web design from $500. A dedicated SMB track serves companies under 50 employees with fixed pricing and EU AI Act compliance support. Everything shipped is real, deployed, production-grade code - no templates.

## Services

- [AI Chatbot](https://elektraos.dev/chatbot/): Custom chatbots trained on your data, multi-language, with lead capture
- [AI Automation](https://elektraos.dev/automation/): Workflow automation - invoice parsing, email routing, CRM updates, lead scoring
- [SEO Optimization](https://elektraos.dev/seo/): Technical SEO audits, Core Web Vitals, schema markup, AI-search visibility
- [Web Design](https://elektraos.dev/design/): Responsive websites built from scratch, mobile-first and SEO-ready
- [Pricing](https://elektraos.dev/pricing/): Transparent pricing with a live project configurator
- [Free Performance Diagnostic](https://elektraos.dev/audit/): Instant website performance score, no signup

## For SMB

- [SMB Home](https://elektraos.dev/smb/): AI, automation and data infrastructure for companies under 50 employees. Fixed pricing, fast onboarding
- [EU AI Act Compliance](https://elektraos.dev/smb/compliance/): Annex IV dossier preparation
- [SMB Pricing](https://elektraos.dev/smb/pricing/): Fair, market-adjusted rates

## Proof

- [Case Studies](https://elektraos.dev/cases/): Live status across 13 shipped production projects
- [ElektraOS](https://elektraos.dev/case-elektraos/): Cognitive operating system - 184K+ lines, 41 agents, 624 endpoints
- [AYLA Luxury](https://elektraos.dev/case-ayla/): Live luxury jewelry e-commerce with AI-visibility audit, 100/100 AI-readability, WhatsApp ordering
- [Loomgraph](https://elektraos.dev/case-loomgraph/): Agentic platform for SEO audits, content briefs, and live internal-link graphs
- [Loomgraph Society](https://elektraos.dev/loomgraph-society/): A hub of websites that grow together through compliant cross-linking
- [Build Log](https://elektraos.dev/log/): Running engineering log of what gets shipped
- [Blog](https://elektraos.dev/blog/): Articles on AI, automation, and web engineering

## Languages

Content is available in 11 locales: English (default), Danish (/da/), German (/de/), French (/fr/), Italian (/it/), Dutch (/nl/), Swedish (/se/), Arabic for Morocco (/ma/), English for Ghana (/gh/), English for the UK (/uk/), and French for Tunisia (/tn/).

- Email: benzad.yossra@gmail.com (replies within 24 hours)
- Location: London, United Kingdom. Remote worldwide.
